title: buddleja acutifolia f. albiflora
intro: Buddleja acutifolia f. albiflora, also known as the White Butterfly Bush, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, antioxidant properties, and potential antimicrobial effects against certain pathogens. The White Butterfly Bush can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a sought-after ingredient in herbal medicine.
